name: Full pipeline benchmark
summary: Benchmark the validated all-Rust Hi-C pipeline only after real-data oracle validation passes.
goal: Measure wall time, CPU, memory, disk, output sizes, and throughput for the all-Rust pipeline without weakening parity requirements.
explicit_non_goals: Do not benchmark before M161 passes.
Do not change runtime behavior while benchmarking.
Do not claim speedup without reporting exact commands and artifacts.
oracle_commands: M161 real-data oracle validation result must pass before M300.
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark command records wall time, CPU utilization, max RSS, disk usage, output sizes, and throughput.
Benchmark docs cite the passing M161 result ledger entry.
No speedup is claimed without exact commands and artifacts.
known_risks: Benchmark results are environment-dependent and must be labeled with hardware and input details.
